prompt: Create a minimalist weather app icon using only three overlapping circles representing sun, cloud, and rain in pastel yellow, gray, and blue
prompt_refined: Generate a minimalist weather app icon. The design must exclusively feature three overlapping circles. A pastel yellow circle should represent the sun, a pastel gray circle should represent a cloud, and a pastel blue circle should represent rain. The circles must overlap clearly to form a unified and simple icon.
objects: pastel yellow circle representing the sun
pastel gray circle representing a cloud
overlapping arrangement of the three circles
